moments.title: World Cup: Scotland vs Brazil Tonight
moments.blurb: Scotland faces Brazil in a crucial FIFA World Cup group stage match in Miami, kicking off at 11 pm UK time tonight.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: Huge night for Scotland! The Tartan Army takes on Brazil in the World Cup group stages tonight. Who's staying up for the 11 PM kick-off?

angles.name: National Buzz
angles.copy: It's Scotland vs Brazil in the World Cup tonight! All eyes on Miami at 11 PM UK time. Can the Scots pull off a shock?

moments.title: World Cup: England Face Panama
moments.blurb: England continues their FIFA World Cup group stage campaign against Panama on Saturday, June 27, in New York-New Jersey, with kick-off at 10 pm UK time.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Next up for England in the World Cup: Panama! The Three Lions play Saturday at 10 PM UK time. Feeling confident for this one?

angles.name: Weekend Match
angles.copy: Who's ready for some weekend World Cup action? England take on Panama on Saturday night. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the third Grand Slam of the tennis season, begins its two-week run at the All England Club in London on Monday, June 29.

angles.name: Tournament Kick-off
angles.copy: It's almost time for strawberries, cream, and world-class tennis! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off this Monday. Who's your pick for the trophy?

angles.name: Summer Tradition
angles.copy: The quintessential British summer event is nearly here! Wimbledon starts Monday in London. Get ready for two weeks of thrilling tennis.

moments.title: Taylor Swift Holds UK No.1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the *Toy Story 5* soundtrack holds the UK Official Singles Chart number one spot for a second consecutive week.

angles.name: Chart Domination
angles.copy: Queen of the charts! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is number one in the UK for a second week. Is it your favourite right now?

angles.name: Movie Magic
angles.copy: From the *Toy Story 5* soundtrack to UK #1! Taylor Swift's latest hit is still dominating the singles chart. Incredible!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off this Saturday, June 27, with a star-studded lineup including Alanis Morissette, Katy Perry, and Michael Bublé performing at the historic Oxfordshire venue.

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Epic weekend ahead! Blenheim Palace Festival starts Saturday with Alanis Morissette, Katy Perry, Michael Bublé and more. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Iconic Acts
angles.copy: From Alanis Morissette to Katy Perry, Blenheim Palace Festival has something for everyone. Kicking off this Saturday!

moments.title: Fire Country Season 4 UK Premiere
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated fourth season of the US firefighting drama *Fire Country* premieres in the UK on Sky Witness and NOW on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: New Season Alert
angles.copy: Get ready for more drama! Fire Country Season 4 lands on Sky Witness and NOW next Wednesday. Who's a fan?

angles.name: Midweek Binge
angles.copy: Your midweek viewing just got hotter. Fire Country Season 4 premieres next Wednesday! What are you hoping to see this season?

moments.title: Happy 40th to Solange Knowles
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning R&B singer, songwriter, and artist Solange Knowles celebrates her 40th birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending big birthday love to the incredible Solange Knowles, who turns 40 today! What's your favourite Solange track?

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the visionary artist Solange Knowles! Her unique sound continues to inspire.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Mick Fleetwood
moments.blurb: Legendary Fleetwood Mac drummer and co-founder Mick Fleetwood celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Mick Fleetwood! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac still drumming strong.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Mick Fleetwood's 79th birthday today! What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac song?

moments.title: Happy 81st to Colin Blunstone
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice of The Zombies, Colin Blunstone, celebrates his 81st birthday today.

angles.name: 60s Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to Colin Blunstone, the legendary voice of The Zombies! Still sounds incredible.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: From 'She's Not There' to 'Time of the Season', happy 81st to the iconic Colin Blunstone!

moments.title: Happy 65th to Curt Smith
moments.blurb: Tears for Fears co-founder, bassist, and vocalist Curt Smith celebrates his 65th birthday today.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the brilliant Curt Smith of Tears for Fears! What's your go-to TFF track?

angles.name: New Wave Star
angles.copy: From 'Everybody Wants to Rule the World' to 'Shout', wishing Curt Smith a very happy 65th today!

moments.title: Happy 67th to Andy McCluskey
moments.blurb: Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark (OMD) co-founder and frontman Andy McCluskey celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Andy McCluskey of OMD! Still making amazing electronic music.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: From 'Enola Gay' to 'Souvenir', wishing OMD's Andy McCluskey a very happy 67th today!

moments.title: Happy 77th to John Illsley
moments.blurb: Dire Straits bassist John Illsley, a key member of the iconic rock band, turns 77 today.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to John Illsley, the brilliant bassist from Dire Straits! What's your favourite Dire Straits track?

angles.name: Iconic Bassist
angles.copy: From 'Sultans of Swing' to 'Money for Nothing', celebrating John Illsley's 77th today!

moments.title: Happy 84th to Arthur Brown
moments.blurb: The 'God of Hellfire' himself, theatrical rock pioneer Arthur Brown, is 84 today.

angles.name: Birthday to the God of Hellfire
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the legendary Arthur Brown! Still as fiery as ever. 🔥

angles.name: Cult Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique artistry of Arthur Brown on his 84th birthday today!

moments.title: Happy 56th to Glenn Medeiros
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Glenn Medeiros, known for his 80s hit 'Nothing's Gonna Change My Love for You,' turns 56 today.

angles.name: 80s Balladeer
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to Glenn Medeiros! 'Nothing's Gonna Change My Love for You' is still a classic.

angles.name: Timeless Love Song
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to Glenn Medeiros today! What's your favourite 80s power ballad?

moments.title: Happy 60th to Hope Sandoval
moments.blurb: Mazzy Star lead singer Hope Sandoval, celebrated for her dreamy vocals, celebrates her 60th birthday today.

angles.name: Indie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to the ethereal voice of Mazzy Star, Hope Sandoval! Her music is pure magic.

angles.name: Dream Pop Queen
angles.copy: From 'Fade Into You' and beyond, wishing Hope Sandoval a very happy 60th today!

moments.title: Chris Isaak Turns 70
moments.blurb: The distinctive voice behind 'Wicked Game,' American singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, turns 70 on Friday.

angles.name: Birthday Buzz
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 70th birthday to the one and only Chris Isaak this Friday! What's your favourite of his hits?

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: From 'Wicked Game' to 'Baby Did a Bad Bad Thing', Chris Isaak turns 70 on Friday!

moments.title: Happy 29th to H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B artist H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) celebrates her 29th birthday this Saturday.

angles.name: R&B Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the incredible H.E.R.! A true talent with Grammys and an Oscar to her name.

angles.name: Music Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing H.E.R. on her 29th birthday this Saturday! What's your favourite H.E.R. song?

moments.title: Happy 55th to Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy 'Misdemeanor' Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott next Wednesday! A true pioneer in music.

angles.name: Music Innovator
angles.copy: From 'Get Ur Freak On' to 'Work It', wishing Missy Elliott a very happy 55th next Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 81st to Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on Wednesday, July 1.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie next Wednesday! Still effortlessly cool.

angles.name: Style Icon
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Call Me', celebrating Debbie Harry's 81st birthday next Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 40th to Lindsay Lohan
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Lindsay Lohan, known for *Mean Girls* and her pop hits, turns 40 on Thursday, July 2.

angles.name: Noughties Pop Star
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the one and only Lindsay Lohan this Thursday! What's your favourite of her songs?

angles.name: Child Star to Icon
angles.copy: From 'Mean Girls' to pop anthems, wishing Lindsay Lohan a very happy 40th birthday this Thursday!

moments.title: Happy 31st to Post Malone
moments.blurb: Chart-topping rapper and singer Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday this Saturday, July 4.

angles.name: Modern Hitmaker
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the genre-bending superstar Post Malone this Saturday! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Weekend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to Post Malone this Saturday! Get ready to party like a rockstar!
